title: crepidomanes venosum
intro: Crepidomanes venosum, also known as the net-veined filmy fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which are believed to aid in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Crepidomanes venosum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea, or made into a poultice to be applied topically.
